module.name: agent
module.purpose: Defines the core agent interface and shared agent data types. It also defines the overview refresh contract used to refresh overview and star-map content.

files.purpose: Module exports for agent contracts and shared types.

items.name: runtime
items.details: Internal generic agent runtime contract module.

items.name: types
items.details: Internal shared agent data type module.

items.name: agent module public surface
items.details: Re-exports overview refresh, runtime, and shared type contracts.
items.code: pub use overview::{OverviewAgent, OverviewOptions, OverviewRefreshPlan, OverviewRefreshRequest};

files.purpose: Defines the generic runtime interface shared by all Marix agents.

items.name: Agent
items.details: Common interface for all Marix agents. An agent exposes an id and can run with input plus context.
implements: run(&self, input: AgentInput, context: AgentContext) -> AgentResult<AgentOutput>

files.purpose: Defines shared agent identifiers, context, input/output, artifacts, and errors.

items.name: AgentId
items.details: Stable identifier wrapper for an agent instance or profile.

items.name: AgentKind
items.details: Classifies agents into overview, planner, executor, and tooling roles.

items.name: AgentContext
items.details: Runtime context passed into an agent run, including workspace root and metadata.

items.name: AgentInput
items.details: Goal plus optional payload for an agent run.

items.name: AgentOutput
items.details: Summary and artifact list returned by an agent.

items.name: AgentArtifact
items.details: A generated or updated file with a semantic artifact kind.

items.name: AgentArtifactKind
items.details: Classifies artifacts such as overview manifests, star maps, documentation, and source files.

items.name: AgentError
items.details: Common error model for invalid input, missing data, and backend errors.

items.name: AgentResult
items.details: Shared result type for agent operations.

files.purpose: Defines the overview refresh contract and refresh data structures.

items.name: OverviewAgent
items.details: Agent interface responsible for refreshing overview content and providing star-map data.

items.name: OverviewRefreshRequest
items.details: Input model for an overview refresh, including repository snapshot, star-map input, and options.

items.name: OverviewOptions
items.details: Feature switches for file view, star map, and diff section generation.

items.name: OverviewRefreshPlan
items.details: Refresh result containing the star map, changed files, and overview paths.

items.name: build_star_map
items.signature: pub fn build_star_map<T: StarMapProvider>(provider: &T, input: StarMapInput) -> StarMapResult<StarMap>
items.details: Convenience function for building a star map through a provider.

notes: OverviewAgent is the key interface node for this module.
AgentResult and AgentError are shared implementation dependencies for all agents.
